identity.name: AdvantEdge360
identity.mission: Integrated business operations platform emphasizing clarity, precision, and comprehensive control.

accent.description: Use sparingly for primary CTAs and critical alerts

colors.theme_strategy: Light mode default for data density. Dark mode available via toggle.

containers.main: container mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.base: rounded-lg border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

rules: Ensure all interactive elements have aria-labels if no text is present.
Maintain a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for normal text.
Use semantic HTML tags (nav, main, article, section, aside).
Support keyboard navigation for all interactive components.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include a 'data-testid' attribute (kebab-case).

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts for dashboards.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Avoid the 'Center-Everything Disease'; align left for readability.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.

setup: Install dependencies: lucide-react, recharts, framer-motion, sonner, date-fns, react-day-picker, clsx, tailwind-merge, @radix-ui/react- slot
Ensure tailwind.config.js extends the theme with the provided colors and spacing.
implementation: Start with the Layout components (Sidebar, Header, MainWrapper).
Implement the Dashboard with the Bento Grid layout.
Build reusable UI components based on Shadcn/UI patterns but customized with the design tokens.
Ensure all forms use React Hook Form and Zod for validation.
Use Recharts for all data visualization with the specified chart colors.
